overview: Bilingual Hindi-English devotional website for Pandit Abhishek Shastri offering Vedic priest services with online UPI/GPay payment for advance bookings and donations.
features: Online UPI/GPay payment for advance bookings using 9026828075
Donations and seva dakshina flow with QR code and UPI deep-link
Payment status tracking on bookings with admin verification
Bilingual Hindi-English devotional website for Vedic priest services
